THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARBAJEL, DELIA GONZALEZ, OSCAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2766 MISSION ST. #220, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JUN-09-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. FAIL TO VACATE, DEFTS TO PAY $600- RENT + $21.43 PER DIEM DAMAGES FROM 5/1/ THRU 6/9/98 + $168- COSTS. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED TO PLTF/
